Reason for split: Preparation is operational; Treasurer and Finance Committee own review and accountability.. Open questions: What annual summary format is required?. Current Treasurer duty area: Manage payroll for paid staff.. Recommended primary home: Outside Payroll / Accounting Vendor. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper, Treasurer, Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Payroll is specialized and compliance-sensitive; KBC should avoid overloading one volunteer with filings and tax deadlines.. Open questions: Which payroll provider or system should be used?. Current Treasurer duty area: Issue W-2s and 1099s.. Recommended primary home: Outside Payroll / Accounting Vendor. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper, Treasurer. Reason for split: Tax forms should be handled by a provider or qualified accounting support when practical.. Open questions: Who currently prepares these forms, and what vendor options exist?. Current Treasurer duty area: Withhold and remit payroll taxes.. Recommended primary home: Outside Payroll / Accounting Vendor. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper, Treasurer. Reason for split: Payroll tax compliance is high-risk and should be handled by a professional process if possible.. Open questions: What legal/accounting review is needed before assigning this?. Current Treasurer duty area: Coordinate salaries and benefits with Finance Committee.. Recommended primary home: Finance Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Personnel Committee, Treasurer, outside vendor. Reason for split: Finance owns budget impact; Personnel owns compensation recommendations and role/evaluation process.. Open questions: Who recommends compensation, and who approves it?. Current Treasurer duty area: Ensure state and federal tax reporting compliance.. Recommended primary home: Outside Payroll / Accounting Vendor. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Finance Committee. Reason for split: The vendor or CPA should provide technical compliance support; Treasurer remains the church liaison.. Open questions: Which tax reporting items apply to KBC beyond payroll?. Current Treasurer duty area: Serve as liaison if payroll/taxes are outsourced.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper, Finance Committee, outside vendor. Reason for split: This preserves officer accountability while allowing technical processing to be outsourced.. Open questions: Should the Bookkeeper handle routine vendor communication with Treasurer oversight?. Current Treasurer duty area: Review payroll and tax processes annually.. Recommended primary home: Finance Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Personnel Committee, outside vendor. Reason for split: Finance should own the annual control review; Personnel should review staffing/compensation implications.. Open questions: Should this be part of the annual audit/review policy?. Current Treasurer duty area: Collaborate with Finance Committee to prepare annual budget.. Recommended primary home: Finance Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Pastor, Deacons, Bookkeeper. Reason for split: Finance Committee owns budget process; Treasurer provides reporting and stewardship input.. Open questions: What budget calendar should KBC use?. Current Treasurer duty area: Provide reports and data to committees, Pastor, and Deacons.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper. Reason for split: Treasurer should communicate financial information; Bookkeeper may prepare underlying reports.. Open questions: Who is authorized to receive detailed versus summary reports?. Current Treasurer duty area: Support compensation documentation for staff.. Recommended primary home: Personnel Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Finance Committee, Treasurer, outside payroll vendor. Reason for split: Personnel owns compensation records and evaluation process; Finance owns budget impact.. Open questions: What compensation documentation should be confidential and where should it be stored?. Current Treasurer duty area: Ensure proper procedures for cash and offerings.. Recommended primary home: Finance Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Bookkeeper, offering counters. Reason for split: Finance should define controls; Treasurer confirms they are followed; Bookkeeper handles records.. Open questions: What offering counting and deposit policy should be adopted?.
